LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SEAN MITCHELL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED REGARDING DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE THAT THE PROPERTY ONLY HAD NINE LEGAL UNITS. DEFENDANT TESTIFIED AT PAGE 29 OF HIS DEPOSITION THAT HE KNEW 2 UNITS SHARED ONE PG&E METER AND THAT HE PAID THAT BILL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Off Calendar Sep-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SEAN MITCHELL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

APPEARANCES: Joseph C. Barton, Esq. of Law Offices of Joseph C. Barton 775-4455 for pltfs & opposing parties; John J. Hartford, Esq. 650/366-7000 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED REGARDING DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE THAT THE PROPERTY ONLY HAD NINE LEGAL UNITS. DEFENDANT TESTIFIED AT PAGE 29 OF HIS DEPOSITION THAT HE KNEW 2 UNITS SHARED ONE PG&E METER AND THAT HE PAID THAT BILL. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
